## Confections.IBarTruffleVersion interface

Version interface for bar truffle confections. Includes frame and cutting dimensions.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IBarTruffleVersion extends IConfectionVersionBase 
```
**Extends:** [IConfectionVersionBase](./ts-chocolate.confections.iconfectionversionbase.md)
